---
title: "SDWBA"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
    fig_caption: yes
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{SDWBA}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
---
# Overview

```{r model_family_header, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_header(
  family = "sdwba",
  pages = c(
    Overview = "index.html",
    Implementation = "sdwba-implementation.html",
    Theory = "sdwba-theory.html"
  )
)
```

```{r sdwba_overview, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
acousticTS:::.model_family_overview(
  family = "sdwba",
  summary = paste(
    "The stochastic distorted wave Born approximation (`SDWBA`) extends the",
    "deterministic `DWBA` by treating unresolved posture and shape variability",
    "as stochastic phase variability along the body."
  ),
  core_idea = paste(
    "Start from the same segmented weak-scattering sum as `DWBA`, then replace",
    "the strictly coherent phase accumulation by a randomized phase model whose",
    "statistics are chosen to mimic unresolved biological variability."
  ),
  best_for = c(
    "Krill-like or zooplankton-like targets where deterministic body geometry is not known precisely",
    "Orientation-averaged or ensemble-style weak-scattering predictions",
    "Situations where fully coherent `DWBA` overpredicts narrow interference structure"
  ),
  supports = c(
    "`FLS` objects with the same geometry support as `DWBA`",
    "Monostatic target strength based on an averaged linear backscatter quantity",
    "The same local contrast notation as `DWBA`, with seawater as medium `1` and the body as medium `2`"
  ),
  assumptions = c(
    "Weak-scattering fluid-like body",
    "Phase variability enters statistically rather than through an explicit new boundary-value solve",
    "Randomization acts on the coherent sum rather than on the local scattering kernel"
  ),
  reading = c(
    "[Implementation](sdwba-implementation.html): stochastic settings, spectra, and validation workflows",
    "[Theory](sdwba-theory.html): randomized coherent sums and scale-invariant phase statistics"
  )
)
```
